last_completed_round.direction_name: Hoist 128x128 Hot-Band Shared Offsets Out Of The Steady-State Loop
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Both active 128x128 hot-band kernels still carry invariant warp-local shared offset arithmetic through the K loop even though row and column warp positions are fixed for the CTA lifetime. Hoisting those offsets once per warp should shave integer address work and reduce control dilution on a surface that is already close to the branch best.

notes: Completed round 10/20. Continue with node_b for round 11/20. Accepted base: 20260421_190652_bf16_gemm_v1_88a8acfc at 24.689153 ms.
